case_title: MANDY LYNNE SNOW VS. PUBLIC STORAGE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-05-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY YEPPO CHENG--DISTRICT MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2014 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SNOW, MANDY LYNNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY SNOW, MANDY LYNNE AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SNOW, MANDY LYNNE AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SNOW, MANDY LYNNE
